reminder.notes:
Fixes location reminders that armed but never rang.

- Location reminders now report the real result of registering the geofence with Google Play services instead of assuming success -- if it can't arm (e.g. device Location off or not set to High accuracy), the app tells you the exact reason instead of going silent.
- The geofence is now primed with a fresh high-accuracy fix at registration, so it can fire for a stationary device instead of waiting for movement.
- Settings > Test location reminder now uses a 150m radius (a sub-100m geofence is too small for Play services to reliably detect) and notifies you if it fails to arm.
- Editor warns clearly if a saved location reminder's geofence could not register.

ai-scanner.notes: Fixes the real cause found via v1.0.15's diagnostics: declined duplicates were older library entries whose files were already gone from disk, not a permission problem. Missing files are now labeled visibly, cleaned up instead of retried, and entries with a file that still exists get a real gallery id resolved so they use the same permission-popup delete as everything else. Adds a manual Recheck button to Find Duplicates.

twinclean.notes: Diagnostic fix: the 'Connect Google Drive' failure path now shows the real underlying error instead of a generic message, so sign-in issues can actually be diagnosed. No feature changes.
